tasks.description: The Whisper decoder in src/transcribe/candle_engine.rs has a critical bug: prompt tokens are appended after <|notimestamps|>, causing the decoder to treat them as transcript output and loop infinitely. The correct Whisper prompt token sequence is: <|startofprev|>[prompt_tokens]<|startoftranscript|><|lang|><|transcribe|><|notimestamps|>. Fix by adding sot_prev_token to SpecialTokens, looking it up in get_special_tokens(), restructuring the token sequence assembly in decode_at_temperature(), and raising MAX_PROMPT_TOKENS from 50 to 224 (the actual Whisper limit).
acceptance_criteria: MAX_PROMPT_TOKENS constant in encode_initial_prompt() is updated from 50 to 224
SpecialTokens struct has a sot_prev_token: u32 field
get_special_tokens() looks up the <|startofprev|> token via self.tokenizer.token_to_id()

When initial_prompt is Some, decode_at_temperature() builds tokens as [sot_prev, ...prompt_tokens, sot, lang, transcribe, notimestamps] for multilingual and [sot_prev, ...prompt_tokens, sot, notimestamps] for english-only models
When initial_prompt is None, the token sequence is unchanged — sot_prev is NOT prepended
cargo test passes with no regressions
cargo check passes without warnings

tasks.description: Create a new src/vocab/ module backed by SQLite for storing personal vocabulary terms that bias Whisper transcription. Add rusqlite = { version = "0.31", features = ["bundled"] } to Cargo.toml. Create src/vocab/store.rs with schema: vocabulary(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, term TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, added_at INTEGER NOT NULL, use_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, source TEXT NOT NULL). The DB file lives at ~/.local/share/mojovoice/vocab.db via state::paths::get_data_dir(). Implement: add_term(term, source), remove_term(term), list_terms(), increment_use_count(term), and get_prompt_string(max_tokens) which returns comma-separated terms sorted by use_count DESC truncated to fit max_tokens. Declare mod vocab; in src/main.rs.
acceptance_criteria: rusqlite with bundled feature is added to Cargo.toml dependencies
src/vocab/mod.rs and src/vocab/store.rs exist and mod vocab; is declared in src/main.rs
open_db() creates vocab.db at the path returned by state::paths::get_data_dir().join("vocab.db") and runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS on first call
add_term("Claude", "manual") inserts successfully and a duplicate call is a no-op (INSERT OR IGNORE)
list_terms() returns a Vec of VocabEntry sorted by use_count DESC then term ASC
get_prompt_string(224) returns Some("Claude, Maximus, Wolfie") with terms sorted by use_count DESC, or None if the store is empty
cargo test passes including unit tests for add_term, remove_term, list_terms, and get_prompt_string using a temp DB path

tasks.feature: Vocab CLI commands and transcription wiring
tasks.description: Add a mojovoice vocab subcommand to the clap CLI in src/main.rs with four sub-subcommands: add <term> (source='manual'), list, remove <term>, and correct <wrong> <right> (adds <right> with source='auto'). Wire vocab into both transcription paths: in cmd_start_fixed() in src/main.rs and in DaemonServer::new() in src/daemon/server.rs, call vocab::store::get_prompt_string(200) and use the result as the initial_prompt argument passed to CandleEngine::with_options(), overriding config.model.prompt. The vocab list command must print a friendly 'No vocabulary terms yet.' message when the store is empty rather than an empty table.
acceptance_criteria: mojovoice vocab add "Claude" prints a confirmation message and the term appears in mojovoice vocab list output
mojovoice vocab list on an empty store prints 'No vocabulary terms yet.' instead of panicking or showing an empty list
mojovoice vocab remove "Claude" removes the term and subsequent list output no longer shows it
mojovoice vocab correct "clod" "Claude" adds "Claude" with source='auto' and prints a confirmation message
cmd_start_fixed() in src/main.rs calls vocab::store::get_prompt_string(200) and passes the result as initial_prompt to CandleEngine::with_options()
DaemonServer::new() in src/daemon/server.rs calls vocab::store::get_prompt_string(200) and passes the result as initial_prompt to CandleEngine::with_options()
cargo test and cargo check both pass with no warnings
